name: Spring Boot Initializr
description: Generate production-ready Spring Boot projects directly from your AI agent using the official start.spring.io API.
longDescription: Spring Boot Initializr is an AI agent skill that wraps the official Spring Initializr API (start.spring.io). It fetches live metadata, validates all parameters, and generates a complete project ZIP — then extracts it ready to open in your IDE. Supports Maven, Gradle (Groovy / Kotlin DSL), Java / Kotlin / Groovy, all standard Spring Boot starters, and Spring Cloud.

skills.name: spring-boot-initializr
skills.description: Generate Spring Boot projects from natural language requests

tools.name: spring-initializr-script
tools.description: CLI wrapper for the Spring Initializr REST API

network.description: Required to fetch metadata and download generated project ZIPs

cache.description: Spring Initializr metadata is cached locally for 1 hour to reduce API calls. Use --force to bypass.

changelog.1.2.0: Fixed retry backoff, suggest_alternatives, HTTPError handling; added --output-dir; removed non-standard -dep alias; Cursor rule + marketplace manifest
changelog.1.1.0: Fixed packageName hyphen stripping, removed hardcoded Java versions, added websocket to mapping table, fixed Spring Cloud BOM note
